# Universal Macro Overlay DB Topology

## Objective
Transition from rigid file-path based relationship mapping to an Omnidirectional Semantic Distance topology using global macroscopic vectors.

## Tasks
1. Upgrade the `manage_knowledge_base` generation pipeline to construct a companion macro collection (e.g., `neo-knowledge-base-macro`).
2. Ensure this macro collection stores raw, un-chunked, 1:1 semantic embeddings for *all* structural artifacts (Guides, Tickets, Source Code, Pull Requests, Tests).
3. Refactor `DreamService.mjs` to query graph node IDs against this pre-calculated Macro DB, completely eliminating slow, on-the-fly string compilation and LLM embedding loops from the gap inference pipeline.
